relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Holy siblings are invited to consider Jesus, apostle and high priest.
Jesus is trustworthy, as Moses was trustworthy.
The builder receives greater honor than the house.
Messiah is Son over the house, and we are that house if hope is held.
The Spirit says: Today, hear the voice.
Do not harden the heart as in wilderness testing.
Ancestors saw the works and still tested.
Wandering heart did not know Divine ways.
Rest was refused to hardened rebellion.
Watch for a heart pulling away from living Divine.
Encourage one another while it is called Today.
Partners of Messiah hold confidence to completion.
Those rescued through Moses still rebelled.

contemplative_note: Hebrews 3 is the word Today: honor Moses, consider Messiah, and keep the heart soft through daily encouragement.
